Metadata.title: Heart of Fantasy | A permadeath MMORPG
Metadata.description: "Heart of Fantasy" is a survival MMORPG with permadeath and a procedurally generated world featuring oceans, rivers, and mountains.

HistorySection.title: About the game
description: Heart of Fantasy is an MMORPG unlike anything you've ever experienced.
In this persistent and cyclical world, darkness plays with the hearts of players.

The Demon King is immortal, not by power, but by emptiness: he divided his heart into fragments and gave them to the darkness. As long as these fragments are scattered across the world, he cannot die.
Only those who gather them all can break his immortality and challenge him in a final battle.
And if they defeat him, they must make a choice: destroy the cycle and begin an era of peace for all, or divide their own heart and surrender it to the darkness, becoming the new Demon King.

features.title: Permadeath
features.description: Every decision matters. If you die, you lose everything: character, gear, and progress. A high-risk system that rewards strategy and turns every victory into a legend. Will you dare to risk it all? 🗡️

features.title: A changing world
features.description: Shape the world: build, transform landscapes, and leave your mark. The environment evolves based on the actions of the community. 🌱

features.title: Infinite skill system
features.description: Skills improve endlessly the more you use them: master your style, from weapons to magic, at your own pace and without limits. ⚔️

features.title: Wraparound map
features.description: A world without borders: when you reach the edge, you reappear on the opposite side. Explore without limits, by land or sea. Geography, like history, is an eternal loop! 🔄

metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Learn how Heart of Fantasy protects your personal data and complies with current privacy regulations.

parts.title: 1. Data We Collect
parts.description:
When you fill out the registration form, we collect the following personal data:

  • Username
  • Email address
  • Password (stored in encrypted format)

parts.title: 2. Purpose of Processing
parts.description:
Your data will be used solely to:

  • Manage your registration and grant you access to the game alpha.

parts.title: 3. Legal Basis
parts.description: The legal basis for processing your data is your explicit consent, given by checking the corresponding box in the form.

parts.title: 4. Data Retention
parts.description: Your data will be retained for as long as the game is in development or until you request its deletion.

parts.title: 5. Recipients
parts.description: We will not share your data with third parties, except when legally required. Data will be stored on secure servers and, if applicable, managed by providers compliant with GDPR.

parts.title: 6. User Rights
parts.description:
You may exercise your rights at any time, including:

  • Access to your personal data.
  • Request for rectification or deletion.
  • Request for restriction or objection to processing.
  • Withdrawal of consent.

To exercise your rights, you can contact us via Discord: https://discord.gg/Qmp4aqJcQ8.

parts.title: 7. Data Security
parts.description: We apply appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure the security of your data and prevent unauthorized access.

metadata.title: Sign Up
metadata.description: Ready to dive into Heart of Fantasy? Sign up for free to create your profile, interact with the community, and enjoy a unique experience.

disclaimer.title: IMPORTANT:
disclaimer.text:
This registration will give you access to the alpha test of the game.
The game is still in active development and there is currently no confirmed release date.
Only the information necessary to manage alpha access and communication with testers is collected (such as your email and username). Your data will not be sold or shared with third parties and will only be used for development and testing purposes.
For your security, do not use a password that you use on other websites or services.
If you would like your data to be removed or have any questions, you can contact through our Discord server: https://discord.gg/Qmp4aqJcQ8
Thank you for helping test and improve the game!

metadata.title: Account Activation
metadata.description: Activate your account for Heart of Fantasy and get ready to explore a world of adventure and danger.

ActivatePage.success:
Your account has been activated successfully.
You can download the game at the following link: Download Heart of Fantasy
ActivatePage.failure: Failed to activate your account. Please check your activation link or contact support for assistance on Discord.

PageNotFound.title: 404 | This page could not be found.

banner.text: We use our own cookies to improve your experience and remember your preferences (such as language). You can accept all cookies, reject them, or configure your preferences.

modal.title: Cookie Settings
modal.description: Review and adjust your preferences. Essential cookies cannot be disabled as they are necessary for the website to function.

essential.title: Strictly Necessary
essential.text: Necessary for the website to function (security, network). They cannot be disabled.

preferences.title: Preferences / Functionality
preferences.text: They allow us to remember choices that change the way the website behaves, such as your preferred language to redirect you automatically.

metadata.title: Cookie Policy
metadata.description: Read the Heart of Fantasy Cookie Policy. Learn what cookies we use, their purpose, and how you can manage your preferences to improve your experience on our website.

purposes.title: Types of cookies we use and their purpose

essential.title: 1. Strictly Necessary Cookies
essential.description: These are essential for the website to function properly. They allow navigation on the page, traffic control, user session identification, and ensure site security. Without these cookies, the website cannot function. Being essential, they do not require user consent.

preferences.title: 2. Preferences or Personalization Cookies
preferences.description: These allow us to remember information so that the user accesses the service with certain characteristics that can differentiate their experience from that of other users. In our case, we use them exclusively to remember the user's preferred language (lang) and load the interface directly in that language on future visits.

revokeConsent.title: Revoking consent
revokeConsent.text: You can withdraw or modify your consent at any time. To do so, click on the 'Cookie Settings' button located below this text block to reopen the preferences panel. You can also manage, restrict, or block cookies at any time from your browser settings.
